emails.subject: Re: deal 499391
emails.body: Re: deal 499391 Just spoke with Sean Crandall he killed deal #499391. This has happened before, and seems to be a glitch in Deal Blotter when traders enter off peak deals. I'll talk with IT about it; but thanks for catching this in the meantime. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 01/18/2001 10:52 AM
